title: ACDLC Forensic Replay Package Schema
description: Standardized schema for .acdlc-replay packets containing verified time-travel snapshots, sequence deltas, and cryptographic chain provenance.

replay_id.description: Unique cryptographic identifier of the replay package.

schema_version.description: ACDLC Platform ABI schema version for compatibility validation.

tenant_id.description: Identifier of the tenant workload context.

domain.description: The logical segment or security tier of the event stream.

timestamp.description: Unix timestamp of the forensic package generation.

snapshot_anchor.description: Name or hash of the historical snapshot file used as the hydration anchor.

archive_epoch.description: The lineage epoch count verifying sequential order of physical logs.

last_sequence.description: The sequence index of the final replayed state transaction.

state_snapshot.description: Serialized memory block representing the StateManager state at the snapshot anchor.

sequence_delta.description: Chronological array of canonical sorted JSON events replayed on top of the snapshot.

archive_chain_verified.description: Verification status of the physical partition rolling SHA-256 hash chains.

rolling_hash_chain.description: Optional mapping of archive filenames to their SHA-256 hashes.

signature_block.description: Optional cryptographic signature validating package provenance.
